programmes.show_description: This episode looks at the dangerous obsession with surgery that often goes hand in hand with a rise to fame.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Jeanette has resorted to smoking marijuana to help alleviate her chronic pain.
A fire alarm begins evacuation efforts; a man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.
Dr Natalia Spierings helps Justin who has a genetic condition which means his skin is covered in lumps made up of nerves. Dr Dev Shah is asked to remove a cyst named Egbert.
Challengers 'Anything Will Do' take on the Eggheads. The group were two separate pub quiz teams until they became friends, and then decided to form a single team. (Ep3)
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Visit Thane.tv and browse our selection of award winning home and fitness products that let you do more with less!
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Retired estate agent Fiona now spends her time helping out her local dog charity ADANA. Wedding planner Louise is grafting hard to dress a church for a couple's big day.
Keith and his family run a butcher's shop catering to Brits in a village near the holiday hotspot of Alicante. And we meet up with Yorkshire-born chip shop owner 'John the Fish'.
At West Orchards, Paige receives an SOS from a new store that a dastardly duo are back. And Farrah is on the case of a pair who work together to hit a small convenience store. (Ep12)
Drink-driving, drug use and atrocious weather all contribute to cases for the Traffic Cops, including one coke-snorting driver who gets arrested twice in quick succession.
Near York, a young man who's stolen his grandfather's car leads the police into a bizarre and dangerous pursuit that ends in a trip to hospital for the youngster.
Near York, officers arrest a car full of suspects with a large haul of drugs, heading for a music festival. Plus, a reckless driver with a history of violence tries to outrun the cops.
A serial offender gives the Cumbrian officers the runaround and a high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish.
The interceptors smash down a door to save a man's life, and a fleeing Land Rover rams two cop cars in a bid to get away.
The Cumbrian interceptors tackle a woman trapped inside a burning car, a bad boy racer, a bullock breakout and drink-related incidents on Black Eye Friday.
A couple go on the run when their claim of being burgled at knifepoint is exposed as fraud. Pub CCTV cameras show a cyclist taking a brewery for a ride.
Cash doubles down on his lie. Sonny snaps at Dana. Kerrie resorts to some of her old tricks.
Harper shuts Kerrie out. Sonny gets a reality check. Levi admits he needs a change.
Documentary series. The doctors deal with a woman in the midst of a panic attack, a chronic asthmatic, a man who can only eat eggs and a harrowing diagnosis of stomach cancer.
Nursing staff have called in sick at Barnsley Hospital and the team is under pressure as patient numbers are rising. A patient in extreme pain needs immediate treatment.
A man and his dangerous dogs have terrorised locals for months. Officers put a specialist team together to bring the owner and his animals in - but it leads to a tense stand-off. (Ep3)
Seventeen-year-old Dougie is rushed in by helicopter after a mountain bike accident leaves him with a catastrophic head injury. A scan shows his brain is bleeding.
Dr Natalia Spierings tackles one of the biggest lipomas of her career, Dr Emma McMullen helps a bride six weeks before 'I do'; and Dr Adil Sheraz treats a patient with a face cyst.
In 2013, teen Jayden Parkinson went missing. Detectives suspect her murder and have questions for her ex-boyfriend. Has Jayden been killed and, if so, where is her body?
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Nurse Ennis changes the dressings on Antonia's finger, following a nasty accident with a coffee grinder.
A man named Terry, who fell off a roof and is seriously injured, needs help. A man named Jeff is brought in by ambulance after his car flipped onto its side.
Return of the dermatologists, with Dr Dev Shah attempting to 'shell out' a giant lipoma, while Dr Emma McMullen tackles a pair of cysts nicknamed Tweedledum and Tweedledee.
Challengers 'Midlife Crisis' take on the Eggheads. The team are all friends or neighbours of team captain Neil. (Ep4)
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Visit Thane.tv and browse our selection of award winning home and fitness products that let you do more with less!
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Series favourite "Coco" has a new rescue - a black stallion he has named Black Beauty, who has medical problems and needs some careful attention from Colin and his Spanish vet Antonio.
We meet again with series favourite Colin "Coco" Brown, who we usually see working hard at the animal rescue centre and farm he runs with his partner Sebastian and son Hugo.
At one of London's most exclusive stores a suspected theft could come in at over the £200 threshold for police involvement. Plus, how AI is changing the theft prevention game. (Ep13)
In North Yorkshire, cops are out in force, protecting lorry drivers and their cargo as organised gangs target goods and trucks. Ther's a hijack on an HGV carrying £1million of goods.
In Leeds the cops are on the look out for a stolen Ford Fiesta; their hunt ending in a dramatic foot chase pursuing one of the mouthiest criminals they've ever seen.
On a busy Bank Holiday weekend, a day trip to Scarborough turns into a high-speed pursuit and a desperate suspect on a motorbike puts lives at risk when a passenger falls off.
A drunken driver is in the fast lane of the M6, dog handler Glenn is given a crash course in marine rescue, and Duggie is called to the scene of a crash.
A routine stop uncovers a large haul of cash, a van driver tries to ram an officer off the M6, and a school bus crashes on a country road.
Hayley helps two badly injured bikers, a drunken driver creates a trail of destruction, Duncan escorts a monster truck through Workington.
A party-loving fraudster is caught claiming for an accident which was his own fault. CCTV exposes a bus passenger's lies.
Harper shuts Kerrie out. Sonny gets a reality check. Levi admits he needs a change.
Mali and Abigail assess their love. Leah makes an announcement. Will David have a change of heart?
A man and his dangerous dogs have terrorised locals for months. Officers put a specialist team together to bring the owner and his animals in - but it leads to a tense stand-off. (Ep3)
...Pay Up! Lewis has a challenging enforcement in the north of England, removing a former premier league footballer's one-time agent from a house the footballer didn't know he owned.
One of the nation's favourite families is at war. We ask whether Brooklyn Beckham's allegations stack up, combing over his claims to find out what has really happened.
When four people are killed in apparently mysterious road collisions, Senior Coroner Dr James Aderley must find the evidence for their desperate families in his biggest case yet.
